design.inputs: payloads + completed + trails + lanes (all reactive, keyed by lane name)
design.free_text: case-insensitive substring; AND across tokens; matches node id/desc, trail cmd/note, lane name
design.empty_query_policy: returns empty result; caller decides fallback

dumb_component_compliance.SearchBar_vue: props in (modelValue, hitCounts, placeholder); events out (update:modelValue, submit, clear); zero fetch/async/setTimeout/imperative DOM in <script setup>
dumb_component_compliance.intelligence_location: useViewerSearch.ts composable owns all parsing + indexing

notes: Global search/filter index across all loaded DAGs. Cheap structured prefixes (status:/lane:/tag:/owner:/cite:§) without committing to a query DSL. Pure composable: caller injects payloads/completed/trails/lanes, no fetch.
